title: pyrostria hystrix
intro: Pyrostria hystrix, also known as the "thorny fire bush," is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Pyrostria hystrix has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Pyrostria hystrix is often combined with other plants to create infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
